hero.title: Find Jobs. Build Your CV. Stand Out.
hero.tagline: Skillexa aggregates thousands of job listings and generates tailored PDF resumes on demand — so you can focus on landing the role.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to land your next job

search.title: Smart Job Discovery
search.description: Browse aggregated listings from top providers, filtered by your skills, location, and preferred salary.

pdf.title: Tailored PDF Resumes
pdf.description: Generate a polished, professionally formatted PDF resume matched to any job posting in seconds.

download.title: Instant Downloads
download.description: Your resume is ready to download via a secure, private link the moment generation completes.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Authenticate securely with your Microsoft account — no password required.

browse.title: Browse jobs
browse.description: Explore thousands of aggregated job listings and find the perfect match.

generate.title: Generate your PDF
generate.description: Kick off an asynchronous PDF generation tailored to the chosen job posting.

download.title: Download
download.description: Receive a secure download link and save your resume with one click.
